analysis.summary: A U.S. F-15E fighter jet was downed over Iran on Friday, and after a complex multi-day rescue operation involving special operations forces, CIA assistance, and a deception campaign, the surviving airman was successfully extracted from deep inside Iranian territory. President Trump announced the rescue early Sunday, calling it an 'Easter Miracle' and one of the most daring search and rescue operations in U.S. history. The incident has raised questions about escalation, with both sides claiming some form of vindication.

The escalating situation is driving diplomatic activity involving Oman, while generating domestic political debate and global economic ripple effects including surging fuel prices.
